n: Chapter 15: An Echo of Days Past

steps.t: Frithgeir is in Zudrugund, the once-abandoned dwarf-hall in Thrór's Coomb. You have travelled with Nár into the mine beneath Zudrugund and witnessed s…
Corunir is at Zudrugund. Frithgeir wants you to speak to Corunir and assure him that Nár means no harm.
